---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

::: panel-tabset

## Infrastructure

::: tech-stack-row
::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/rstudio/rstudio-original.svg" class="tech-icon"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[RStudio]{.tech-title}
[IDE]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/quarto-dev/quarto-web/main/favicon.png" class="tech-icon"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[Quarto]{.tech-title}
[Tech Pub]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/4b/Tableau_Logo.png" class="tech-icon"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[Tableau]{.tech-title}
[Visualization]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/vercel/vercel-original-wordmark.svg" class="tech-icon icon-white"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[Vercel]{.tech-title}
[Live Server]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/hex-stickers/master/SVG/shiny.svg" class="tech-icon"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[Shiny]{.tech-title}
[Framework]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/github/github-original.svg" class="tech-icon icon-white"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[GitHub]{.tech-title}
[Repository]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/r/r-original.svg" class="tech-icon"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[R]{.tech-title}
[Language]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/css3/css3-original.svg" class="tech-icon"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[CSS3]{.tech-title}
[Styling]{.tech-label}
:::
:::
:::

## The Human Logic

::: tech-stack-row
::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D5603AQGRYVWP73RxdQ/profile-displayphoto-crop_800_800/B56ZrbOZKSIcAI-/0/1764614575949?e=1778112000&amp;v=beta&amp;t=qU0-vahdz93o-p7x5nzJg3QIa57jNmVX4R0SKh98uLk" class="profile-photo"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[Charles Jr]{.tech-title}
[Developer]{.tech-label}
:::
:::

::: vertical-tech-card
::: card-header
<img src="https://staffphoto.smu.edu.sg/s/tskam/600x400" class="profile-photo"/>
:::
::: card-footer
[Dr. Kam]{.tech-title}
[Mentor]{.tech-label}
:::
:::
:::

:::
